name: IRC_OFFERS
description: Stores all the offer related details.

columns.Name: OFFER_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key for this entity.

columns.Name: START_DATE_CHANGED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if proposed start date is changed in HR phase.

columns.Name: BATCH_CREATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if offer was created as part of a batch.

columns.Name: ADDITIONALTEXT1
columns.Comments: Offer Letter additional text 1.

columns.Name: ADDITIONALTEXT2
columns.Comments: Offer Letter additional text 2.

columns.Name: OFFER_LETTER_LAYOUT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B table. Refers to BIP template used to generate the offer letter.

columns.Name: ONBOARDING_OSN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_ONBOARDING_OSN

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores offer expiration date of this offer.

columns.Name: OFFER_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the name of this offer. Offer name is not translatable.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_SUBMISSIONS table. Refers to the Job submission.

columns.Name: PRESELECTED_HR_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the action id of the Offer. Foreign key to the PER_ACTIONS_B table.

columns.Name: HANDOFF_HR_SCENARIO_ID
columns.Comments: Stores Offer handoff scenario ID

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the person id of the candidate for  this Offer. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: PRESELECTED_HR_ACTIONTYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the action type code that you can also get on the preselected hr action relation.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PERSON_ID of the recruiter for this Offer. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ASSIGNMENT_ID of the recruiter's assignment for this Offer. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_OFFER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ASSIGNMENT_ID of the Offer. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: HIRING_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PERSON_ID of the hiring manager for this Offer. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ASSIGNMENT_ID of the hiring manager's assignment for this Offer. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: OFFER_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Contains the text in the "Comments" field of the Comments And Attachments section for an Offer

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Stores the comments associated to the offer.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: (Rich) text for describing the offer to the candidate.

columns.Name: ESIGNATURE_INSTRUCTIONS
columns.Comments: Copy of the ESignature instructions for EOffer.

columns.Name: ACCEPTED_ON_BEHALF
columns.Comments: To recall if current Offer got accepted on behalf of the candidate. The default value 'N' represents Candidate Acceptance, 'Y' represents Recruiter Acceptance on behalf of the candidate and 'A' represents Agent Acceptance on behalf of the candidate.

columns.Name: ACCEPTED_ON_BEHALF_BY_ID
columns.Comments: User who has accepted on behalf of the candidate

columns.Name: ACCEPTED_ON_BEHALF_DATE
columns.Comments: Date at which the offer got accepted on behalf

columns.Name: APPROVAL_SUBMITTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates Date and Time of Offer Submission for approval

columns.Name: APPROVAL_REJECTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates Date and Time of Offer approval rejection

columns.Name: EXTENDED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores last extended date of the offer.

columns.Name: WITHDRAWN_REJECTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores last withdrawn date of the offer.

columns.Name: ACCEPTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores last accepted date of the offer.

columns.Name: APPROVED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the approved date of the offer.

columns.Name: DRAFTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores last drafted date of the offer.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OFFER_LETTER_CUSTOMIZED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Column that tells if the offer letter is customized or relies on the Content Library version.

columns.Name: RTF_RESOLVED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Column that indicates whether the custom offer letter was resolved before downloading.

columns.Name: MOVE_TO_HR_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the Move to HR status lookup code of the offer.  The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_OFFER_MOVE_TO_HR_STATUS.

columns.Name: MOVE_TO_HR_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp when the offer got moved to HR phase.

columns.Name: OFFER_MOVE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates last move status of offer. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_OFFER_MOVE_STATUS.

columns.Name: EXTEND_SCHEDULE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time when the offer is scheduled to be extended.

columns.Name: EXTEND_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the last update of extend offer.

columns.Name: EXTEND_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who last updated extend offer.

columns.Name: EXTEND_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the latest request ID of the job for extend offer.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the object.

columns.Name: PARENT_OFFER_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_OFFERS_B.OFFER_ID

columns.Name: MERGED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Determines if the Offer is a result of merge.

columns.Name: BYPASS_OFFER_LC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Determines if the user has opted to speed through offer phase.

columns.Name: DUP_CHECK_FAILED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to determine duplicate check status.

columns.Name: STATE_POST_PROCESS_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the Post processing status for a given state. Lookup ORA_IRC_STATE_PROCESS_STATUS.

columns.Name: ASYNC_QUEUED_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date when the offer was queued for asynchronous processing.

columns.Name: ASYNC_RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Indicates the number of times the retry has been attempted for an asynchronous process.

columns.Name: HR_PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the timestamp when the Offer was last moved to HR Processed State.

columns.Name: AUTO_PROCESS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Column that determines whether the offer for internal candidate should be included or excluded in Auto Processing.

columns.Name: MOVE_TO_HR_PREVAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Column that determines if the Move to HR prevalidations are completed.

columns.Name: REDRAFT_COUNT
columns.Comments: Indicates the number of times that the current offer is redrafted.

columns.Name: VISITED_SECTIONS
columns.Comments: Offer visited sections information

columns.Name: PROJECTED_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the Proposed start date entered on the Basic Info of Assignment

columns.Name: CURRENT_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the current state of the Job Application.Foreign Key to IRC_STATES_B

columns.Name: CURRENT_PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the current phase of the Job Application. Foreign Key to table IRC_PHASES_B

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Requisition ID of the Job Offer. Foreign Key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Stores the Candidate Number of Candidate on the Job Offer

columns.Name: REQUISITION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Stores the Requisition Number of Requisition on the Job Offer

columns.Name: SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the Person type of Candidate when applied to the job Application

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Business Unit ID of the Offer Assignment

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Department ID of the Offer Assignment

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Position ID of the Offer Assignment

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Legal Employer ID of the Offer Assignment

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Job ID of the Offer Assignment

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Work Location ID of the Offer Assignment
